label: Software Engineer (AI Platform) at Replika
headline: Software Engineer (AI Platform) – Backend Systems, Scalability, LLM Integration (.NET, C#, SQL/PostgreSQL, Azure DevOps)

storable.title: Software Engineer II
description: Built and maintained scalable .NET Core services with Hangfire, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server to drive real-time insurance auto-protect workflows.
Developed and maintained web applications and APIs, ensuring data synchronization and high availability across desktop and web products.
Clarified service boundaries and contributed to domain-driven design adoption, improving system stability and maintainability for future growth.

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer / Azure DevOps
description: Led delivery of GLP-compliant lab software, designing and building ASP.NET WebAPI services with RESTful OData and SOAP endpoints backed by Oracle for high-availability systems.
Implemented configurable reporting pipelines and user-defined data models that ensured traceability and audit trails, supporting complex data operations at scale.
Guided release engineering and Azure DevOps practices for builds and deployments, ensuring scalability and reliability of applied services.

solid-earth.title: Application Developer / Architect
description: Developed and maintained RETS client and server software on Oracle and C#, achieving high performance and protocol compliance for real-time data handling.
Tuned RETS performance, protocol compliance, and data handling to keep broker and MLS integrations reliable and support scalable data flows.
Built configurable ASP.NET MLS frontends with XML-driven branding and business rules, enabling diverse experiences without code changes and contributing to system design.
Delivered full-stack .NET and SQL Server development for inventory and operations workflows, focusing on backend data management and reliable service endpoints.
Designed database schemas and service endpoints to maintain data consistency and support applications across web and mobile surfaces.
Built a C# mobile application for a Sheriff's department to capture and sync field data, demonstrating experience with integrated systems.
